clusters.title: Systems & Windows internals
clusters.blurb: Rust tooling that goes under the hood of Windows — injection, hooks, tray daemons.

clusters.title: Security tooling
clusters.blurb: Assessment tools for authorized use, with the framing to match.

clusters.title: Pre-hospital & clinical medicine
clusters.blurb: Calculators, decision support, and computational models built from the EMS track.

clusters.title: Climbing, outdoors & physics
clusters.blurb: Physics engines and hardware replicas for rope, rock, and retro aerospace.

clusters.title: Networking & privacy
clusters.blurb: Daemons and monitors that keep traffic where it belongs.

clusters.title: Dev tooling & libraries
clusters.blurb: Small, sharp libraries published to PyPI.

clusters.title: AI & computer vision
clusters.blurb: Real-time vision pipelines and generative experiments.

clusters.title: Consumer & games
clusters.blurb: Tools for the games I actually play.

projects.name: capture-bypass
projects.tagline: DLL-injection tool that bypasses screen-capture protection on Windows 10/11. Multi-crate workspace, egui GUI, Inno installer.

projects.name: HideDesktopApps
projects.tagline: Tray utility to hide desktop icons, taskbar, and windows via hotkeys — for ricing, Wallpaper Engine, and presentations.

projects.name: clipvault
projects.tagline: Keyboard-first clipboard-manager daemon: system-wide capture, ring buffer, hotkey overlay.

projects.name: pc-optimizer
projects.tagline: "PC Optimizer Pro" — Windows tweak, fan-control, RGB, and debloat suite living in the tray.

projects.name: drugdose
projects.tagline: EMS & clinical drug-dosing calculator — weight-based dosing, 49-drug database, interaction rules.

projects.name: vitalscore
projects.tagline: Clinical scoring calculators — severity and triage scores as a clean Python API.

projects.name: Clinical_IQ
projects.tagline: Point-of-care decision support for emergency medicine.

projects.name: akribia
projects.tagline: Computational model of precision-weighted Bayesian inference across autism, ADHD, and PPCS — with a live in-browser demo.

projects.name: ropesim
projects.tagline: Models lead-fall dynamics with a damped spring / RK4 integrator in Rust, exposed to Python via PyO3/Maturin. Ships a full Python API, a five-command CLI, and a PySide6 desktop GUI.

projects.name: apollo-rope-memory
projects.tagline: Working replica of Apollo-era core rope memory — ferrite toroids, induction read, comparator front-end.

projects.name: pygeospy
projects.tagline: GEOINT/OSINT library, Rust-accelerated — SAR grids, EXIF, and terrain analysis.

projects.name: qbit-killswitch
projects.tagline: VPN killswitch daemon for qBittorrent — pauses torrents the instant your public IP changes. Cross-platform tray app.

projects.name: mullvad-wg-monitor
projects.tagline: Benchmarks and monitors Mullvad WireGuard endpoints.

projects.name: patchnotes
projects.tagline: Parser and tooling for Keep a Changelog changelogs.

projects.name: Live_Video_Feed_Facial_Recognition
projects.tagline: Real-time facial recognition pipeline running on a live webcam or video feed.

projects.name: kto
projects.tagline: "Kick Them Out" v3 — WiFi security-assessment tool with CLI, TUI, and GUI. Authorized use only.

projects.name: deadpoint
projects.tagline: Purple-team RNG analysis toolkit — detects predictable randomness (MT19937, LCG, xorshift), recovers the generator's state to prove it, then recommends the fix. Embedded/OT audit framing.

projects.name: ValoTracker
projects.tagline: Real-time VALORANT match tracker — 10-player ranks, stats, and encounter history. Reads only 127.0.0.1, no login.
